summary: AIR-DROW Interaction & Hand Scan Polish Edition: locks Android long-press selection and tap flashes, makes scanner status marks reliable, and keeps successful hand checks visible before a calm exit animation.
features: Disables Android text selection, long-press Copy/Search callouts and blue tap-highlight flashes across the drawing interface while preserving real text-entry fields.
Uses inline vector status marks for verified, warning and problem scanner states so Android Chromium cannot lose stroked mask icons.
Shows the explicit Hand check passed confirmation before the scanner fades away with a calm completion animation.
Retains secure WebAssembly support for local MediaPipe, lazy hand-runtime caching and quiet local-project recovery.
Retains Kurdish (Sorani) and English interface support with responsive RTL/LTR layout.

privacy.drawings: Your drawing data and preferences stay on your device unless you choose to export, share, or use an optional AI creation action.
privacy.camera: Camera permission is requested only after you choose to open the camera. Camera video is not saved by AIR-DROW.
privacy.handTracking: The deployed app uses the local same-origin hand model and runtime. It does not download a hand model while you draw.
privacy.checks: App readiness and Hand drawing check only read local browser and app state. They do not open the camera themselves or send a report anywhere.

buildPolicy.runtimeNetwork: The deployed browser loads the hand runtime and hand model from the same AIR-DROW site.
buildPolicy.delivery: The complete source package includes the verified hand model. The production build validates the local model before publishing.
